source_pr.title: *: update dependencies and remove obsolete commands in kvproto.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Map/dict iteration order is not stable across runs. This PR stabilizes it by: *: update dependencies and remove obsolete commands in kvproto.
fix_pattern: *: update dependencies and remove obsolete commands in kvproto.
